title: The End of the Kharijites' Support for cAbdallah b. alZubayr in Mecca and the Dissensions among Them
description: b. al-Zubayr in Mecca and the Dissensions among Them I was told on the authority of HishAm b. Muhammad alKalbi-Abu Mikhnaf Lot b. YahyA-Abu al-MukhAriq al-RAsibl: Ibn ZiyAd, following Abu BilAl's killing, hunted down the KhawArij strenuously. Even before that he had not held back from them or spared them, but following the killing of Abu Bildl he devoted himself to eradicating them and extir404. On Shabath b. Rib°i al-Riy3hi, leader of the Tamim in al-Kufah, see Crone, Slaves, i 18; Rotter, Bnrgerkrieg, index. 405.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 20
